title: Add production environment safety checks
goal: Prevent unsafe staging and production deploys caused by placeholder values, weak secrets, or missing public Next.js build-time variables.
scope: Pass NEXT_PUBLIC_* values into the web Docker build.
Add a Compose .env generator for staging and production.
Add a Compose .env validator for required secrets and environment-specific networking.
Run validation inside the staging and production deploy workflow before rebuilding containers.
Document the generation and validation flow.
verification: Generated staging and production env files pass validation.
completed_notes: Added build args for NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to the web Docker build.
Updated deploy workflow to validate staging and production .env files before deployment.
Updated deployment documentation with env generation and validation steps.
